author: Taylou (Product Manager, Laescient Opportunities)
quote: Shahvaiz has been instrumental to the success of this project—not only as a highly skilled developer but as a true creative partner. He has met dozens of critical, often high-pressure deadlines with consistency and professionalism, oftentimes exceeding expectations. Beyond that, he has gone far beyond the expectations of his role by learning complex mathematical logic in order to help design and implement a groundbreaking educational video game. His calm demeanor, problem-solving ability, and deep commitment to the project's mission have made him an indispensable teammate and co-creator.

author: Aureliusvito (Product Manager, IndieDev)
quote: This developer really knows what needs to be done. I gave some rough data of my game's GDD so it can be balanced. As promised, in 10 days the balancing data is delivered. I need some revisions and it was delivered quickly and perfectly. Thank you for the nice experience.

author: Legendn (CEO of Game Studio)
quote: Working with Shahvaiz was an exceptional experience. He will not leave anything until you're fully satisfied with it & will communicate & brainstorm ideas with you for however long you want. Not to mention, he went above & beyond with the creation of the document & added many extra pages & even an Excel sheet out of his own kindness. 10/10, recommending to friends & looking to work more with Shahvaiz.
